title: 關係代名詞 whose（所有格關係子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞 + whose + 名詞 + 動詞（表所有關係，whose作所有格關係代名詞）
名詞 + whose + 名詞 + 動詞 + 受詞（whose修飾的名詞作主詞或受詞）

explanation: Whose 是所有格關係代名詞，用來連接主句名詞與修飾子句，表示所有關係或從屬關係。Whose 後接名詞，該名詞可在子句中作主詞或受詞。Whose 可修飾人或物，等同 his/her/its/their 的功能。使用時須確保 whose 修飾的名詞與先行詞的關係明確，且子句需完整具有主詞、動詞等要素。易混淆點：勿與 who/which 混淆；whose + N 中的名詞不可省略。

examples.eng: The student whose homework was lost felt very worried about the exam.
examples.chi: 那位功課遺失的學生對考試感到非常擔憂。

examples.eng: I met a teacher whose teaching methods greatly influenced my interest in science.
examples.chi: 我遇到一位老師，他的教學方法大大影響了我對科學的興趣。

examples.eng: The company whose products we use has been in business for twenty years.
examples.chi: 我們使用其產品的那家公司已經經營了二十年。

examples.eng: People whose dreams are big often achieve great success in their careers.
examples.chi: 夢想遠大的人通常在事業中取得巨大成功。

extension.tip: 判斷 whose 時，將其替換為所有格代名詞檢驗：「The student whose homework...」= 「The student (his homework)...」。注意 whose 後必須跟名詞（不跟動詞），且該名詞在子句中須有明確角色。若句子中未提及被修飾的名詞，改用 of which 或 of whom。

examples.result: → 正確：The student whose excuse was absent. 或 The student who was absent.（whose 後必須接名詞）

examples.test: 正：The author whose novels I read is very famous.
examples.result: → whose novels 作 read 的受詞；等同 The author whose novels I read = The author (I read his novels)

examples.test: 對比：People whose dreams are big vs. People of great dreams.
examples.result: → 前者為關係代名詞用法，後者為介詞片語，兩者皆可，前者更正式通順

extension.note: Whose + N = 所有格代名詞（his/her/its/their）的角色，whose 後一定要有名詞。

parts: was very encouraging to all students in the class.
exercises.sentence: The teacher whose guidance was very encouraging to all students in the class.
exercises.translation: 那位指導非常激勵班級中所有學生的老師。

parts: lives in Taipei and studies engineering.
exercises.sentence: I have a friend whose apartment I visited last summer, who lives in Taipei and studies engineering.
exercises.translation: 我有一位朋友，他的公寓我去年夏天去過，他住在台北並學習工程。

parts: have increased their market share significantly this year.
exercises.sentence: The company whose products we use have increased their market share significantly this year.
exercises.translation: 我們使用其產品的那家公司今年大幅增加了市場佔有率。

parts: are often admitted to top universities around the world.
exercises.sentence: Students whose achievements are remarkable are often admitted to top universities around the world.
exercises.translation: 成就非凡的學生通常被世界頂尖大學錄取。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The girl _______ parents are doctors wants to study medicine.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (whose)。Whose 為所有格關係代名詞，用來表示所有關係。句子意為「父母是醫生的女孩想學醫」，whose parents 表示「她的父母」。選項 A (who) 為主格，C (which) 修飾物而非人，D (that) 不可用於非限制性或含所有格之情況。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當的關係代名詞完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: I have a neighbor _______ house was damaged in the recent storm.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (whose)。Whose 可修飾人或物，此處修飾人 neighbor，whose house 表示「他/她的房子」。句子意為「我有一個鄰居，他/她的房子在最近的暴風雨中被損毀」。選項 A (who) 為主格，B (which) 須修飾 house 但不能表所有關係，D (whom) 為受格。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞及其後續形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: The company _______ CEO recently retired has been operating for fifty years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (whose)。Whose 後必須接名詞，whose CEO 表示「該公司的執行長」。句子意為「執行長最近退休的那家公司已營運五十年」。選項 A (that) 不可用於所有格表達，B (which) 後須接完整動詞但不表所有關係，D (who) 為主格無法表所有格。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷適當的關係代名詞及其在複雜句中的應用
mc_exercises.question_eng: The researcher _______ innovative methods have revolutionized the field received numerous international awards, _______ made her colleagues deeply envious.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (whose... which)。第一空用 whose 表「她的創新方法」修飾名詞 methods；第二空用 which 引導非限制性關係子句，修飾前面整個主要子句「獲得眾多國際獎項」。選項 B (who... that) 中 who 無法表所有格，that 不可引導非限制性子句；C (whom... which) 中 whom 不表所有格；D (whose... that) 中 that 不可引導非限制性子句。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我喜歡那位老師，她的課堂非常有趣。
translation_exercises.answer: I like the teacher whose classes are very interesting.
key_points: 子句完整性（主詞 + 動詞）
hints: 句型框架：N + whose + N + V...，whose 後必須接名詞
注意：不能寫成 'whose is interesting'，whose 後一定要有名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我找到了一本書，它的作者是我最喜歡的作家。
translation_exercises.answer: I found a book whose author is my favorite writer.
hints: 句型框架：N + whose + N + V + C（補語），whose 可修飾人或物
易錯點：勿寫成 'whose is my favorite writer'；whose 後必須接名詞 author

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那些學生的家庭作業還沒有交，老師很擔心。
translation_exercises.answer: The students whose homework has not been submitted are worrying the teacher.
key_points: N + whose + N + V + O 結構
現在完成被動式（has not been submitted）
hints: 句型框架：N + whose + N + V + O，whose 後接的名詞可作子句主詞
注意主詞單複數一致：homework 為單數，所以用 has；若為 homeworks 複數則用 have

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 科技公司的員工們失去了對公司未來的信心，導致許多人辭職。
translation_exercises.answer: Employees of tech companies whose future they had lost confidence in have resigned.
key_points: 過去完成式與現在完成式的時態對比
hints: 句型框架：N + whose + N + V + O，whose 後接的名詞可在子句中作受詞而非主詞
易錯點：當 whose + N 在子句中作受詞時，子句仍需有主詞（they），結構為 whose N + S + V + O
